goal: Create the BatchProcessingLog entity, Liquibase migrations, config seed data, and update the BatchProcessingResult DTO

tasks.name: Create BatchProcessingLog entity, enum, and repository
tasks.action: Create BatchProcessingStatus enum (STARTED, COMPLETED, FAILED). Create BatchProcessingLog entity extending BaseEntity with processingMonth (unique varchar), status, loansProcessed, interestAccrued, penalizedLoans, closedLoans, warningsSummary, startedAt, completedAt, triggeredBy. Create repository with findByProcessingMonth, existsByProcessingMonth, findTopByStatusOrderByProcessingMonthDesc.

tasks.name: Create Liquibase migrations and seed config keys
tasks.action: Create batch_processing_log table migration with unique constraint on processing_month and index on status. Seed 3 config keys: loan.batch.processing_day_of_month=1, loan.batch.new_loan_threshold_day=15, loan.batch.last_processed_month=empty. Register in master changelog.

tasks.name: Update BatchProcessingResult DTO and LoanApplicationRepository
tasks.action: Add List<String> warnings and String processingMonth fields to BatchProcessingResult. Add findByStatusAndDisbursedAtAfter and findByStatusAndDisbursedAtBefore queries to LoanApplicationRepository.

commitMessage: feat(loan-batch): add BatchProcessingLog entity, migrations, and config seeds
